targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM((metadata->>'total_abs_saving')::int) FROM traces WHERE ('${tenant}' = '.*' OR metadata->>'tenant_id' = '${tenant}') AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND ('${user_id}' = 'All' OR metadata->>'user_id' = '${user_id}')

SELECT ROUND(SUM((metadata->>'cost_saving_usd')::float)::numeric, 2) FROM traces WHERE ('${tenant}' = '.*' OR metadata->>'tenant_id' = '${tenant}') AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND ('${user_id}' = 'All' OR metadata->>'user_id' = '${user_id}')
SELECT ROUND(AVG((metadata->>'total_pct_saving')::float)::numeric, 1) FROM traces WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND ('${user_id}' = 'All' OR metadata->>'user_id' = '${user_id}')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM traces WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND ('${user_id}' = 'All' OR metadata->>'user_id' = '${user_id}')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT metadata->>'user_id') FROM traces WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, SUM((metadata->>'total_abs_saving')::int) AS tokens_saved FROM traces WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND ('${user_id}' = 'All' OR metadata->>'user_id' = '${user_id}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, metadata->>'user_id' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS calls FROM traces WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT key AS group, SUM((value->>'abs_saving')::int) AS total_saved FROM traces, jsonb_each(metadata->'step_savings') WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND ('${user_id}' = 'All' OR metadata->>'user_id' = '${user_id}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total_saved DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Daily Cost Saved per User (30d, USD)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, metadata->>'user_id' AS metric, ROUND(SUM((metadata->>'cost_saving_usd')::float)::numeric,4) AS cost_saved FROM traces WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at)::date AS day, metadata->>'user_id' AS user_id, COUNT(*) AS calls, SUM((metadata->>'total_abs_saving')::int) AS tokens_saved, ROUND(AVG((metadata->>'total_pct_saving')::float)::numeric,1) AS avg_pct_saving, ROUND(SUM((metadata->>'cost_saving_usd')::float)::numeric,4) AS cost_saved_usd FROM traces WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND ('${user_id}' = 'All' OR metadata->>'user_id' = '${user_id}') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1 DESC, tokens_saved DESC

list.name: user_id
list.label: User
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT metadata->>'user_id' FROM traces WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY 1
